Sanuri Supplies and Office Interiors

About us

“We offer quality and detailed services to all”

Having a team that is well qualified, transparent, and effective to ensure client satisfactory. Offering quality and detailed services to our partners. Ensuring and upholding transparency to our Clients by walking together side by side acknowledging your buy testosterone cypionate 200mg online ideas and desires. We are well abled and equipped to deliver on all our objectives, having experience in this field and interacting with various clients has expanded our niche and broadened our threshold in delivering beyond our clients’ expectations.

WHAT WE SUPPLY

Office Supply

Office Furniture

Office Setup

Stationary Items

OFFICE SUPPLIES

Office Supplies are essential to any business, government office, school, and healthcare facility. Both large scale and small scale businesses need office supplies. We offer state of the art supplies when it comes to this section. Bringing in modern equipment, easy to use and reliable for your business and institutions. We also offer management services to our clients and partners to ensure effectiveness of the machines.

Some of the office supplies services we offer our clients and partners are:

  • Computers [desktops and laptops]
  • Printers
  • Planners
  • Files and Folders
  • Document Scanners
  • Photocopiers and Telephones.

OFFICE FURNITURE

Whether you run a large office, a small office, or even a home office there are many items you will need to ensure you can work productively and effectively. We change the work experience of your place of work by bringing in furniture that give you comfort. From the office of the CEO, board room, other office spaces, and lounge area. Choosing the right colour and the right design.

  • Desks
  • Office chairs
  • Filing cabinet
  • Meeting chairs and chairs
  • Bookcases
  • Sofas

OFFICE SETUP

Setting up an office to some might be hectic. We offer services for setting up your office space to suit your liking and the type of business you do. We walk with you hand in hand so that we can meet your desires. We design every space to make it suitable for your business and to make it look appealing to the eye. From the front office, to the common office space, individual offices, the lounge or break room and office Kitchen. We ensure that the interior gives you a warm and inviting feeling as you walk in the office. From the type of walls, floor design, the ceiling designs and the lighting. We bring your business to life through the Art of designing.

We start the process with:

  • Space and location identity.
  • Visual designing the space.
  • Partitioning of the office space.
  • Interior designing.
  • Supply of the: Office supplies and Office furniture.

Stationary Items

Stationery plays an essential role in our day to day life. Stationery is a MUST need for any learning facility, government office, any company and health care facility. They both use the items for different functions. We offer modern solutions when it comes to the stationery items. Durable and easy to use for our esteemed clients and partners.

List of stationery items we supply:

  • Highlighter Pens
  • Note Pads
  • Staplers
  • Whiteners
  • Scissors
  • Rulers
  • Papers
  • Calendars
  • Document holders
  • Paperclips
  • Tapes
  • White / blackboards
  • Erasers
  • Pencils/Sharpeners
  • Branded year books

OUR CUSTOMERS

  • Private companies, NGOs and Government offices. (Both Large-scale and Small-scale)
  • Learning institutions like: Primary Schools, High schools, Universities and colleges
  • Health care facilities.
